feedback.comment:
Bug:
When a user writes a note and immediately navigates to Settings or Change Log, the recently written note disappears—even after pressing Ctrl + Save.

- Deepak Paaji
feedback.userAgent: Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/146.0.0.0 Safari/537.36

feedback.comment:
Suggestion:

2. emoji on Title
- Deepak
